author: Jonathan Zamora and Edwin Juarez;UCSD-MesirovLab
plan:
## Seurat.IntegrateData GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Seurat.IntegrateData is a GenePattern module that Batch Correction for Seurat Objects

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 6 parameters:
- Required: input_files, use_batch_names, ncomps, nCount_RNA, nFeature_RNA, output_file_name
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore <libdir>integrate_data.R --input_files  <input_files>  --use_batch_names <use_batch_names> --ncomps <ncomps> --nCount_RNA <nCount_RNA> --nFeature_RNA <nFeature_RNA> --output_file_name <output_file_name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/seurat-suite\:4.0.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input_files
parameters.description:
Gene expression matrices (columns are cell IDs and rows are genes) stored in a `.txt` or one Seurat Object (`.rds`) file per batch.

If your files are in 10x Genomics (Cell Ranger) format or stored in a `.tar`, or `.gz` file, please use the Seurat.QC module to pre-process your data and then use the `.txt` or `.rds` output from Seurat.QC in this module.

For sample data see test data file 1 and test data file 2.

parameters.name: use_batch_names
parameters.description:
(default \= TRUE) Map each input file to Batch Numbers beginning with Batch 1 and going up to Batch n where n represents the number of input files.\n

\nWhen set to FALSE, the batch names will be set to the file names.

parameters.name: ncomps
parameters.description: (default \= 50) The number of principal components to be used in the Principal Component Analysis (PCA) for batch correction.

parameters.name: nCount_RNA
parameters.description: (default \= TRUE) Whether or not the batch correction script will produce a violin plot of the number of molecules detected within a cell for our single-cell datasets.

parameters.name: nFeature_RNA
parameters.description: (default \= TRUE) Whether or not the batch correction script will produce a violin plot of the number of genes detected within each cell of our single-cell datasets.

parameters.name: output_file_name
parameters.description: (default \= 'batch_correction_results') Base name for the .pdf and .rds output files.
